name: bandit_live_world_nearby_camp_light_horde_v0_2026-04-27
description: Visible-light horde bridge proof footing: reuse the McWilliams/Basecamp playtest-kit save, set the save to nighttime, seed a real bandit_camp just beyond direct-player range, and inject a visible/safe same-OMT raw fd_fire field near but not on the player. This proves the loaded-map fire/light reader can drive the live horde signal bridge; it is not player-lit fire product proof.
